Module(
  body=[
    ImportFrom(
      module='utils',
      names=[
        alias(name='calculate_discount')],
      level=0),
    FunctionDef(
      name='checkout',
      args=arguments(
        posonlyargs=[],
        args=[
          arg(arg='cart_items')],
        kwonlyargs=[],
        kw_defaults=[],
        defaults=[]),
      body=[
        Expr(
          value=Constant(value='Calculate cart total and apply a flat discount.')),
        Assign(
          targets=[
            Name(id='total', ctx=Store())],
          value=Call(
            func=Name(id='sum', ctx=Load()),
            args=[
              GeneratorExp(
                elt=BinOp(
                  left=Subscript(
                    value=Name(id='item', ctx=Load()),
                    slice=Constant(value='price'),
                    ctx=Load()),
                  op=Mult(),
                  right=Call(
                    func=Attribute(
                      value=Name(id='item', ctx=Load()),
                      attr='get',
                      ctx=Load()),
                    args=[
                      Constant(value='quantity'),
                      Constant(value=1)],
                    keywords=[])),
                generators=[
                  comprehension(
                    target=Name(id='item', ctx=Store()),
                    iter=Name(id='cart_items', ctx=Load()),
                    ifs=[],
                    is_async=0)])],
            keywords=[])),
        Assign(
          targets=[
            Name(id='discount_rate', ctx=Store())],
          value=Constant(value=0.1)),
        Return(
          value=Call(
            func=Name(id='calculate_discount', ctx=Load()),
            args=[
              Name(id='total', ctx=Load()),
              Name(id='discount_rate', ctx=Load())],
            keywords=[]))],
      decorator_list=[])],
  type_ignores=[])

  body=[

      args=arguments(

Module(
  body=[
    FunctionDef(
      name='calculate_discount',
      args=arguments(
        posonlyargs=[],
        args=[
          arg(arg='price'),
          arg(arg='discount_rate'),
          arg(arg='user_tier')],
        kwonlyargs=[],
        kw_defaults=[],
        defaults=[]),
      body=[
        Expr(
          value=Constant(value='Return the price after applying a tier-adjusted discount rate.')),
        Assign(
          targets=[
            Name(id='tier_bonus', ctx=Store())],
          value=Dict(
            keys=[
              Constant(value='bronze'),
              Constant(value='silver'),
              Constant(value='gold'),
              Constant(value='platinum')],
            values=[
              Constant(value=0.0),
              Constant(value=0.02),
              Constant(value=0.05),
              Constant(value=0.08)])),
        Assign(
          targets=[
            Name(id='effective_rate', ctx=Store())],
          value=BinOp(
            left=Name(id='discount_rate', ctx=Load()),
            op=Add(),
            right=Call(
              func=Attribute(
                value=Name(id='tier_bonus', ctx=Load()),
                attr='get',
                ctx=Load()),
              args=[
                Call(
                  func=Attribute(
                    value=Name(id='user_tier', ctx=Load()),
                    attr='lower',
                    ctx=Load()),
                  args=[],
                  keywords=[]),
                Constant(value=0.0)],
              keywords=[]))),
        Return(
          value=BinOp(
            left=Name(id='price', ctx=Load()),
            op=Mult(),
            right=BinOp(
              left=Constant(value=1),
              op=Sub(),
              right=Name(id='effective_rate', ctx=Load()))))],
      decorator_list=[])],
  type_ignores=[])
